failurePattern.triggerCondition: Test failure due to API endpoint port mismatch
failurePattern.userFeedbackPattern: Tests failing with port configuration inconsistency

details: Tests expected localhost:3001 but implementation uses localhost:3000
Request body format mismatch between expected and actual API structure
WebSocket URL format mismatch in test expectations
Undefined instances array causing runtime errors in component
environmentFactors: Test configuration had hardcoded port 3001 expectations
API structure changed from {name, mode, cwd, args} to {command, workingDirectory}

missedOpportunities: Tests should have been written to match actual API implementation
Mock configuration should reflect real WebSocket URL patterns
API contract tests could prevent endpoint mismatches
recommendedTddPatterns: Mock factory patterns for consistent test data

changes: Updated all API endpoint expectations from localhost:3001 to localhost:3000
Fixed request body format from {name, mode, cwd, args} to {command, workingDirectory}
Fixed undefined instances array by initializing with empty array in mock
Added proper WebSocket mock configuration with all required properties

inputPattern.errorContext: API endpoint mismatch in test expectations

immediateActions: Add API contract validation in CI/CD pipeline
Create mock factories for consistent test data
Add endpoint health checks in test setup
longTermImprovements: Implement OpenAPI specification for API contracts
Add automated endpoint discovery for tests
Create shared configuration for development environments
Implement service mesh for consistent routing
